findings.description: Section s1 is titled 「プロパティファイルの書き換え」(an H3 in the source) but its content spans three source sections: H2「前提事項」, H2「提供方法」, and H3「プロパティファイルの書き換え」. The title does not reflect the full scope of the section. Users or AI agents searching for prerequisite or installation information may not associate this section with those topics via its title alone.
findings.source_evidence: Source H2 headings: 前提事項, 提供方法, Eclipseとの連携設定. Source H3: プロパティファイルの書き換え. All of 前提事項 and 提供方法 are merged into s1 but s1 is titled with only the H3 name.

findings.description: The introductory sentence of the source H2 section「Eclipseとの連携設定」— 「以下の設定をすることでEclipseから本ツールを起動できる。」— is omitted from both s2 and s3. This sentence explains the purpose of the Eclipse integration steps (enabling the tool to be launched from Eclipse) and provides context that links the sub-steps together.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「Eclipseとの連携設定」section begins with 「以下の設定をすることでEclipseから本ツールを起動できる。」. Neither s2 nor s3 contains this statement.
